title: From hallowed to hollowed
description: "If you want to pursue law as a career, Faculty of Law, Delhi University is the place to go." Those were the words of my teacher, spoken with quiet certainty, as I stood at the threshold of choosing a path. The Faculty of Law, University of Delhi, has long been more than an institution. It has been a place where the law was not merely studied, but felt, argued and lived.What separated it from others was never infrastructure or rank; it was the culture. It was the quiet intensity of students who
